description: Represents a Greengrass core device, which is an IoT thing that runs the IoT Greengrass Core software.

Arn.description: The ARN of the core device.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the core device.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[^:]*:greengrass:[^:]*:[0-9]+:coreDevices:.+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CoreDeviceThingName.description: The name of the core device. This is also the name of the IoT thing.
CoreDeviceThingName.markdownDescription:
The name of the core device. This is also the name of the IoT thing.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: Replacement

CoreVersion.description: The version of the IoT Greengrass Core software that the core device runs.
CoreVersion.markdownDescription:
The version of the IoT Greengrass Core software that the core device runs.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Platform.description: The operating system platform that the core device runs.
Platform.markdownDescription:
The operating system platform that the core device runs.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Architecture.description: The computer architecture of the core device.
Architecture.markdownDescription:
The computer architecture of the core device.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Runtime.description: The runtime for the core device. The runtime can be aws_nucleus_classic or aws_nucleus_lite.
Runtime.markdownDescription:
The runtime for the core device. The runtime can be aws_nucleus_classic or aws_nucleus_lite.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.description: The status of the core device.
Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the core device.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: HEALTHY | UNHEALTHY  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LastStatusUpdateTimestamp.description: The time at which the core device's status last updated, expressed in ISO 8601 format.
LastStatusUpdateTimestamp.markdownDescription:
The time at which the core device's status last updated, expressed in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Tags.description: Tags associated with the core device.
